sentences.translation: Baka je ispekla slatku tortu za unuke.
sentences.translationEn: The grandmother baked sweet cake for the grandchildren.

sentences.translation: Stavila je u njega grožđice, orahe i med.
sentences.translationEn: She put raisins, walnuts, and honey in it.

sentences.arabic: أَخْرَجَتِ الْكَعْكَ مِنَ الْفُرْنِ وَبَرَّدَتْهُ قَلِيلًا.
sentences.translation: Izvadila je tortu iz rerne i malo je ohladila.
sentences.translationEn: She took the cake out of the oven and let it cool a little.

sentences.arabic: أَكَلَ الْأَحْفَادُ وَقَالُوا: يَا سَلَامَ يَا جَدَّةُ!
sentences.translation: Unuci su jeli i rekli: Bravo bako!
sentences.translationEn: The grandchildren ate and said: Wonderful grandmother!
